cases.description: 空索引下 digest 应返回安全 fallback，而不是抛异常或空 proposal。

actual.message: Digest workflow completed with safe fallback.

digest_result.digest_markdown:
当前索引中还没有可用于生成 DAILY_DIGEST 的笔记。
请先执行一次 INGEST_STEWARD，再重新触发 digest。

cases.description: 单 note scoped ingest 在 proposal 模式下应产出真实治理 proposal，并在 deterministic embedding mock 下显式消费 hybrid related candidate。

actual.message: Ingest workflow generated a proposal and is waiting for approval.

proposal.summary: 为 Alpha 补最小治理标记与审查小节，结合 3 条 related retrieve 上下文，聚焦 3 个治理信号（orphan_hint、missing_frontmatter、unclassified_note_type）。

cases.description: 第二条 generic note 在 proposal 模式下也应产出受限治理 proposal，避免 ingest golden 只有单一路径。

actual.message: Ingest workflow generated a proposal and is waiting for approval.

proposal.summary: 为 Beta 补最小治理标记与审查小节，结合 3 条 related retrieve 上下文，聚焦 2 个治理信号（missing_frontmatter、unclassified_note_type）。

cases.description: 结构稳定的 daily note 在 proposal 模式下应安全退回 completed，而不是硬造治理 proposal。

actual.message: Ingest workflow completed with scoped note sync; no approval proposal was generated.

cases.description: 对 waiting proposal 执行 reject，应完成 checkpoint 并写入 rejection audit，而不会生成 writeback_result。

actual.message: Workflow resume recorded rejection. No writeback was executed.

proposal.summary: Insert the generated digest into the daily review note.

cases.description: approve 后附带成功 writeback_result，应写入 completed checkpoint 和成功审计记录。

actual.message: Workflow resume recorded approval and persisted a successful writeback result, but scoped ingest refresh failed: Scoped ingest note path does not exist: /private/var/folders/k1/fyz1kmds28dbvwxxbrrxt4rw0000gn/T/ks_eval_resume_fixture_writeback_success_vxpkt08q/vault/Digest/2026-03-14.md

proposal.summary: Insert the generated digest into the daily review note.

cases.description: approve 后附带失败 writeback_result，应保留 completed checkpoint 和失败审计事实，不能伪装成成功写回。

actual.message: Workflow resume recorded approval, but the plugin reported a failed writeback result.

proposal.summary: Insert the generated digest into the daily review note.
